arts.ttl: When River Plate icon Diaz took over fourth-tier Oxford
arts.sum: Twenty years on from Ramon Diaz's surprising appointment at Oxford United, BBC Sport looks at what happened and how it went.

arts.ttl: UPDATES: Millwall v Oxford United – live
arts.sum: All the build-up, action and reaction as Oxford United make the New Year’s Day trip to Millwall. Gary Rowett has overseen home wins against Cardiff City and Plymouth Argyle since taking over as U’s head coach. Millwall (13th) v Oxford United (20th) Comment below or tweet @OxfordMailOUFC to get involved.
Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Ciaron Brown happy to be surprise name at top of U’s goal involvements chart
arts.sum: CIARON Brown is more than happy to be playing his part in the final third, as he finds himself a surprise name at the top of the goal involvements chart for Oxford United.

arts.ttl: ‘A great start under Neil’ – Millwall vs Oxford United prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Millwall vs Oxford United prediction ahead of the Championship clash on New Years' Day. The post ‘A great start under Neil’ – Millwall vs Oxford United prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Millwall appoint ex-Preston and Stoke boss Neil
arts.sum: Millwall appoint former Preston, Sunderland and Stoke City boss Alex Neil as their head coach to replace Neil Harris.

arts.ttl: Preview: Millwall vs. Oxford United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Millwall and Oxford United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Alex Neil not setting any limitations on success this season after taking on Millwall job
arts.sum: “I’ve been in at two clubs mid-season – Sunderland and Norwich – both ended up promoted,” Neil told Millwall TV . I’m a big believer in developing our own players but also you do need good quality senior players around that to make it work.
